KEYBOARD & MOUSE CONTROLS (P1)
W/A/S/D - Movement / Strafe
SHIFT - Sprint (uses stamina)
MOUSE AIM - Point reticle to target
LEFT CLICK - Fire / Detonate Drone
SCROLL WHEEL - Cycle weapons
Q / Z - Cycle Left / Right HUD menus
E / C - Use Left / Right HUD item
F - Interact / Pick up / Land Drone
F (Hold) - Drill Breakable Walls
P / ESC - Pause operational area
CONTROLLER MAPPING (P1 / P2)
LEFT STICK - Movement / Strafe
RIGHT STICK - Aim / Rotate Reticle
RT (Trigger) - Fire / Detonate Drone
LT (Trigger) - Sprint (uses stamina)
LB / RB - Cycle weapon selection (Left/Right)
D-PAD UP / DOWN - Scroll Consumables (Left HUD)
D-PAD LEFT - Cycle Cursor Zoom (1x/2x/3x)
L3 (Stick Press) - Use selected Consumable
TRIANGLE / CROSS (Y/A) - Scroll Placeables (Right HUD)
R3 (Stick Press) - Place selected Placeable
SQUARE (X button) - Pick up item / Land Drone
START - Pause operational area

Maximum number of blood pools, shell casings, gore chunks and scorch marks kept on the ground at once. Raise it to let carnage pile up longer in extended runs; lower it if things start chugging on a weaker device.

SAVE DATA (CROSS-DEVICE SYNC)

Your progress, unlocks, colors, and settings live only in this browser on this device. Export a save file, sync it across your devices (e.g. via Tailscale), and Import it anywhere to carry everything over. Import fully replaces the current save on this device.
Tip: Export writes frozensoldat_save.json. Point your file-sync at it, then Import that same file on any device.

Rank Waves Defended Difficulty Date Logged

GLOBAL FIELD UPGRADES — INTEL BANK: 0

Intel is earned by completing waves and eliminating Elites. These upgrades persist between all runs.

FROZEN SOLDAT: FIELD MANUAL

Quick-reference. Drop in, survive the perimeter, extract with Intel, come back stronger.

1. THE CORE LOOP

  • Survive waves → earn Cash → spend it between waves → repeat. Cash is per-run; it dies when you do.
  • Intel is the permanent currency. Clear waves and kill Elites to bank it, then spend it in the Armory on the menu for upgrades that stick across every future run.
  • Elites (2.2x HP) drop cash, ammo, health, and sometimes a blue Perk Case — grab it to pause and pick a run-defining perk (Vampiric, Explosive, Smart Munitions…).
  • Wave Mutators (Blackout, Swarm, Juggernaut, Adrenaline) shake up individual waves. Roll with them or exploit them.

2. GAME MODES

  • Normal Wave Ops: The main event. Build a loadout wave by wave, fight bosses, extract.
  • Action Now: Instant horde mode. Fixed loadout, free perks, cash to burn, minimal prep — pure combat.
  • Extraction: Big open maps with objectives (uplinks, hostages) and a Heat Director that escalates as you make noise. Get loud, get hunted. Extract before you're overrun.
  • FPV Operator: Asymmetric bunker defense. You're locked in base — fight only through drones, turrets, and Spot robots watching the feed.
  • Chaos Draft: Roguelite. No shop — after each wave you draft 1 of 3 random cards. Landmark waves (5/10/15/20) spawn mutated bosses. Also home to the Black Market (below).

3. TACTICAL ASSETS

  • FPV Drone: Fly it yourself — your operative is locked while piloting. Upgrade to Bomber to drop 3 bombs before you detonate on-target.
  • Spot Robot: Ground companion that shoots on its own. Tap the screen / hit interact to send it to a waypoint. MK.II = faster, hits way harder.
  • Hunter Swarm: Mini-drones that orbit you and peel off to dive-bomb whatever's close.
  • Auto Turret & Barrier: Drop static defense. Turret MK.II and Barrier MK.II add serious durability and firepower.
  • Most advanced assets must be unlocked in the Armory first — see below.

4. OVERCLOCKS & PERKS

  • Clean Overclocks: Straight upgrades bought with cash for the current run — Hollow Point, Exo-Servos, Extended Mags, Fire Rate, Max HP.
  • Corrupted Overclocks: Power with a price. Overpressure (+dmg / +kick & spread), Glass Nerves (+fire rate / +damage taken), Cold Barrel (silent / -dmg). High risk, high reward.
  • Operator Kits: Unlock in the Armory, pick one per player on the menu — each gives a starting loadout, a passive, and cash-back on a shop category.
  • Escalation Protocols: Opt-in extraction risk toggles that crank danger for bonus Intel.

5. ARMORY, BLACK MARKET & PRESTIGE

  • Armory (menu): Spend Intel to permanently boost base stats (Kevlar, Cardio, First Aid…) AND to unlock shop capabilities — FPV drones, Spot, Swarms, MK.II gear, and the Overclock markets. Locked gear shows "UNLOCK IN ARMORY" in the shop until you own it.
  • Chaos Draft Black Market: Blow surplus cash between draft cards — Reroll the hand, Take Two, launder cash into Intel, sign a push-your-luck Blood Wager, or yank the Contraband Slots.
  • Prestige: Max out every Armory upgrade and the Prestige button unlocks. Prestiging wipes your Intel and upgrades back to zero, bumps your Prestige level, and rewards a fresh menu color theme + a rank badge. The ultimate flex.

6. CLASSIFIED: DEV TERMINAL

  • Unlock: Rapidly click the "FROZEN SOLDAT" title on the main menu 10 times.
  • Open: In a match, press ~ or F1 for the Developer Command Center — god mode, spawners, infinite cash, forced mutators.
